code.text: Specimen information

text.div:
Specimen information

Test12-AUG-2016Specimen
Appearance of UrineCloudy urineUrine
Odor of UrineUrine smell ammoniacalUrine
Clarity of UrineTranslucentUrine
Color of UrineBrown colorUrine

Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows elevated serum creatinine, indicating impaired renal function. Urinalysis reveals significant proteinuria and glucosuria, with low specific gravity and abnormal urine appearance (cloudy, brown, ammoniacal), but no hematuria or leukocyturia. These findings suggest possible chronic kidney disease with tubular dysfunction. Further nephrological evaluation is recommended.

coding.display: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
